reference: Hi, my three-year-old daughter has been ill for some time now. She has had a persistent cough since October two thousand and ten and has been ill since January two thousand and eleven with a high temperature, a cold, and the cough. She is so worn out and has lost weight. An X-ray showed a small shadow on her right lung. Now I am really worried as I have to wait to be referred to a specialist, and I am not sure how long that will take. I just feel she is being dosed up with medicine constantly, but with no effect. She has been prescribed another antibiotic as of yesterday, but I am now struggling to get her to take it because it is making her feel sick, and I think she has had enough of taking them. Please help.
text: Hi, my three-year-old daughter has been ill for some time now. She has had a persistent cough since October two thousand and ten and has been ill since January two thousand and eleven, with a high temperature, a cold, and the cough. She is so worn out and has lost weight. An X-ray showed a small shadow on her right lung. Now I am really worried as I have to wait to be referred to a specialist, and I am not sure how long that will take. I just feel she has been dosed up with medicine constantly, but with no effect. She has been prescribed another antibiotic as of yesterday. But I am now struggling to get her to take it because it is making her feel sick, and I think she has had enough of taking them. Please help.
